subcodes.title: Words to travellers from the East, Port Said, 1913-06-27
subcodes.first_line: This is indeed a good gathering; it does not get any better than this. With rapt attention to God, His loved ones in attendance here are seated next to one another
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه خوب مجلسی است بهتر از این نمیشود حاضرین از احبای الهی در کمال توجه
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences
